name: Kheriyat Khoj
content: Ya kismat ke kaandhe pe sar?
Baarish mein phisal gaya tha, dar-asal; yeh-
Abhi abhi, yahin kahin, abhi kahin yahin aas paas kahin khoya hai dil. Dekha hai kahin?
Jooti ki dori ka patla sa resha phir bhi kisi ghaa'ns ke taar se bandh sake, aisa bhi toh ho sakta hai,
Jaan-e-man? Bandhan toh koi bhi kar sakta hai,

Jis dharti ko tum pooj'te ho, uski mitti mein mil tum khud hi ghul jao, bhool jao ki tum kabhi they bhi ya they hi nahin; bas yahin kahin, abhi kahin yahin aas paas kahin khoya hai dil. Dekha hai kahin?
Hey Musafir, khojon ki suljhan mein uljha premi prem kahani bun'ne ke bahane se uska pukaare chain, jiske prem mein andhe premi ko kaid karein tihaare nain. Hey Musafir,
Mujhse teri kahaniyan sun'ta hai. Hai toh tu bhi Musafir, na jaane kahan rehta hai; yahan, wahan, yahin kahin yahin aas paas kahin khoya hai dil. Dekha hai kahin?
